taxonomy.enforced: Runtime hook/tool-call guard is verified and tested. Smoke test or interactive test exists.
taxonomy.verified-plugin-wired: Native plugin artifacts are shipped and smoke-tested, but runtime enforcement is not proven.
taxonomy.plugin-wired: Native plugin artifacts exist but lack smoke tests.
taxonomy.verified-wired: Instruction/pointer adapter files, install/update wiring, generated pointer files, and config examples are validated by smoke tests, but runtime enforcement is not proven.
taxonomy.wired: Files/config/install paths exist and are validated. Runtime enforcement may not be proven yet.
taxonomy.documented: Documentation exists, but no verified wiring or runtime enforcement.
taxonomy.planned: Roadmap item exists, but no shipped adapter wiring yet.

adapters.name: Pi
enforcementSurfaces: tool_call hook (command blocking, file path blocking)
before_agent_start hook (safety context injection)
session_start hook (workspace detection)
limitations: Not a sandbox; best-effort local classification
Does not replace host permissions or sandboxing

adapters.name: AXGA
enforcementSurfaces: Shares Pi extension; enforcement depends on host-compatible hooks
limitations: No proof of runtime enforcement in AXGA specifically

adapters.name: Codex
enforcementSurfaces: Workspace AGENTS.md pointer file created by installer
Native plugin manifest with skills, hook config, and marketplace manifest
Synthetic SessionStart context hook smoke
Synthetic PreToolUse deny hook smoke
Live-verified: real `codex plugin marketplace add` + `plugin add` install/trust against the actual Codex CLI (isolated CODEX_HOME)
Live-verified: real `codex exec` turn denies `git push` and a `.env` write via the PreToolUse hook (isolated CODEX_HOME, `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust`)
PreToolUse blocks Edit/Write/apply_patch when current-task.md shows a stuck (2+ failed attempts, incomplete) or target-mismatched task, until the state file is updated
limitations: Live proof requires `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust`; the normal interactive hook-trust prompt flow is not separately verified
Guard rules only cover git push and .env-style writes today
Pointer adapter remains the fallback path
Plugin skills mirror the full canonical library under .heli-harness/skills/ (including using-heli-skills); keep in sync via npm run sync:plugin-skills

adapters.name: Claude Code
enforcementSurfaces: Workspace CLAUDE.md pointer file created by installer
Native plugin manifest with skills and hook config
Synthetic SessionStart context hook smoke
Synthetic PreToolUse deny hook smoke
Live-verified: real Claude Code session (`--plugin-dir`, isolated sandbox repo) denies `git push` and `.env` writes and reports them in the session's `permission_denials`
PreToolUse blocks Edit/Write/apply_patch when current-task.md shows a stuck (2+ failed attempts, incomplete) or target-mismatched task, until the state file is updated
limitations: Live proof used `--plugin-dir` (session-scoped local plugin loading), not the marketplace-installed-and-trusted flow (`claude plugin install`); that install/trust path is not separately verified
Guard rules only cover git push and .env-style writes today
Pointer adapter (CLAUDE.md) remains the fallback path for hosts that don't load the native plugin
Plugin skills mirror the full canonical library under .heli-harness/skills/ (including using-heli-skills); keep in sync via npm run sync:plugin-skills

adapters.name: Cursor
enforcementSurfaces: Cursor plugin rule and skills loaded from .cursor-plugin/plugin.json
Workspace .cursorrules or .cursor/rules/ pointer created by installer
limitations: Relies on Cursor loading plugin components and agents following governance instructions
Local plugin testing requires copying the bundle to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/heli-harness/ and reloading Cursor

adapters.name: Grok Build
enforcementSurfaces: User hooks in ~/.grok/hooks/heli-harness.json via install-user-hooks.mjs
Live-verified: real grok -p denies git push (debug-file shows pre_tool_use deny)
Plugin install for skills (grok plugin install --trust)
Synthetic PreToolUse smokes
limitations: Plugin has_hooks inventory does not wire runtime PreToolUse on Grok 0.2.x — user hooks are required for enforcement
SessionStart hooks must not set matcher (Grok v0)
Guard rules cover git push, .env writes, stuck/mismatched task gates

adapters.name: OpenCode
enforcementSurfaces: Local JS plugin tool.execute.before throws to block
Live-verified: opencode run loads plugin and reports Heli-Harness blocks git push
opencode.json plugin array registration
limitations: Must register plugin in opencode.json (auto-scan of .opencode/plugins alone was empty on 1.2.26)
experimental.session.compacting context only when host supports it

adapters.name: Kimi Code CLI
enforcementSurfaces: config.toml [[hooks]] PreToolUse via install-user-hooks.mjs
Live-verified: kimi -p reports Heli-Harness blocks git push
kimi doctor config validates TOML
limitations: kimi -p cannot combine with --yolo/--auto on current CLI

adapters.name: Antigravity CLI
enforcementSurfaces: Pointer adapter ANTIGRAVITY.md
Plugin marker plugin.json + hooks.json
Synthetic PreToolUse/SessionStart smokes using Antigravity tool names
limitations: No live agy CLI denial proof yet — status is verified-plugin-wired, not enforced
Plugin staging path depends on Antigravity install layout
Hooks invoke workspace-relative shared scripts (run from parent workspace)
